page.name: PLAY 8
page.shift_pad5: action_deck 1 ? deck 1 mute_stem vocal off & deck 2 mute_stem vocal on & deck 3 mute_stem vocal on & deck 4 mute_stem vocal on : action_deck 2 ? deck 1 mute_stem vocal on & deck 2 mute_stem vocal off & deck 3 mute_stem vocal on & deck 4 mute_stem vocal on : action_deck 3 ? deck 1 mute_stem vocal on & deck 2 mute_stem vocal on & deck 3 mute_stem vocal off & deck 4 mute_stem vocal on : deck 1 mute_stem vocal on & deck 2 mute_stem vocal on & deck 3 mute_stem vocal on & deck 4 mute_stem vocal off

param1.name: `pad_has_16pads ? var_equal 'hcpage' 0 ? get_text 'CUES 1-16' : var_equal 'hcpage' 1 ? get_text 'CUES 17-32' : var_equal 'hcpage' 2 ? get_text 'CUES 33-48' : var_equal 'hcpage' 3 ? get_text 'CUES 49-64' : var_equal 'hcpage' 4 ? get_text 'CUES 65-80' : var_equal 'hcpage' 5 ? get_text 'CUES 81-96' : var_equal 'hcpage' 6 ? get_text 'CUES 97-112' : nothing : var_equal 'hcpage' 0 ? get_text 'CUES 1-8' : var_equal 'hcpage' 1 ? get_text 'CUES 9-16' : var_equal 'hcpage' 2 ? get_text 'CUES 17-24' : var_equal 'hcpage' 3 ? get_text 'CUES 25-32' : var_equal 'hcpage' 4 ? get_text 'CUES 33-40' : var_equal 'hcpage' 5 ? get_text 'CUES 41-48' : var_equal 'hcpage' 6 ? get_text 'CUES 49-56' : var_equal 'hcpage' 7 ? get_text 'CUES 57-64' : var_equal 'hcpage' 8 ? get_text 'CUES 65-72' : var_equal 'hcpage' 9 ? get_text 'CUES 73-80' : var_equal 'hcpage' 10 ? get_text 'CUES 81-88' : var_equal 'hcpage' 11 ? get_text 'CUES 89-96' : var_equal 'hcpage' 12 ? get_text 'CUES 97-104' : var_equal 'hcpage' 13 ? get_text 'CUES 105-112'`

page.param1: pad_has_16pads ? param_smaller 0 ? var_equal 'hcpage' 0 ? nothing : cycle 'hcpage' -7 : var_equal 'hcpage' 6 ? nothing : cycle 'hcpage' +7 : param_smaller 0 ? var_equal 'hcpage' 0 ? nothing : cycle 'hcpage' -15 : var_equal 'hcpage' 13 ? nothing : cycle 'hcpage' +15
